items.title: Commonwealth Games LIVE: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrive in Dr Who Tardis for Glasgow opening ceremony
items.standfirst: The 2026 Commonwealth Games begin with the Opening Ceremony in Glasgow, with Nina Kennedy and Tim Hodge leading Australia out as the flag and baton bearers. Follow all the action.
items.content: The 2026 Commonwealth Games begin with the Opening Ceremony in Glasgow, with Nina Kennedy and Tim Hodge leading Australia out as the flag and baton bearers. Follow all the action.

items.title: Kennedy arrives early to lead Australia into Glasgow opening ceremony

clusters.neutral_headline: Researcher shocked as orca blows up a sunfish in front of her

items.title: Researcher shocked as orca blows up a sunfish in front of her
items.standfirst: Underwater video captures the moment killer whales in the Gulf of California slam into a sunfish, causing it to explode. Researchers say the orcas may use the technique to make it easier for juvenile killer whales to feed or they do it as a fun group bonding exercise.
items.content: Underwater video captures the moment killer whales in the Gulf of California slam into a sunfish, causing it to explode. Researchers say the orcas may use the technique to make it easier for juvenile killer whales to feed or they do it as a fun group bonding exercise.
